mapper.select: SELECT notice_id, notice_title, notice_content, notice_hit, notice_created_at, notice_updated_at FROM notice ORDER BY notice_created_at DESC
SELECT notice_id, notice_title, notice_content, notice_hit, notice_created_at, notice_updated_at FROM notice WHERE notice_id = #{noticeId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notice (notice_title, notice_content, notice_hit, notice_created_at, notice_updated_at) VALUES (#{noticeTitle}, #{noticeContent}, 0, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE notice SET notice_title = #{noticeTitle}, notice_content = #{noticeContent}, notice_updated_at = NOW() WHERE notice_id = #{noticeId}
